mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(ROOM_NO, 10, 3)), 0) + 1 AS 'MAXNO' FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE SUBSTRING(ROOM_NO, 2, 8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')
SELECT IFNULL(MAX(SUBSTRING(CNO, 10, 3)), 0) + 1 AS 'MAXNO' FROM CHAT_MSG WHERE SUBSTRING(CNO, 2, 8) = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d')

SELECT R.ROOM_NO AS roomNo, R.INO AS ino, R.BUYER_MNO AS buyerMno, R.SELLER_MNO AS sellerMno, R.CRDATE AS crdate, I.ITITLE AS ititle, -- ★ 추가: IPHOTO 문자열에서 첫 번째 쉼표 전까지만 잘라오기 IFNULL(SUBSTRING_INDEX(I.IPHOTO, ',', 1), '') AS iphoto, (SELECT MID FROM MEMBER WHERE MNO = CASE WHEN R.BUYER_MNO = #{mno} THEN R.SELLER_MNO ELSE R.BUYER_MNO END ) AS opponentNickname, (SELECT CONTENT FROM CHAT_MSG WHERE ROOM_NO = R.ROOM_NO ORDER BY CDATE DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastContent, (SELECT CDATE FROM CHAT_MSG WHERE ROOM_NO = R.ROOM_NO ORDER BY CDATE DESC LIMIT 1) AS lastCdate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MSG M WHERE M.ROOM_NO = R.ROOM_NO AND M.READYN = 'N' AND M.SENDER_MNO != #{mno}) AS unreadCount FROM CHAT_ROOM R JOIN ITEM I ON R.INO = I.INO WHERE (R.BUYER_MNO = #{mno} OR R.SELLER_MNO = #{mno}) -- ★ 추가: 메시지가 최소 1개 이상 존재하는 방만 노출 (방만 만들고 나간 경우 제외) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM CHAT_MSG M WHERE M.ROOM_NO = R.ROOM_NO)
ORDER BY -- 1. 안 읽은 메시지가 있는 방을 최우선 (CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MSG M WHERE M.ROOM_NO = R.ROOM_NO AND M.READYN = 'N' AND M.SENDER_MNO != #{mno}) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC, -- 2. 마지막 메시지 시간 순 (메시지가 없으면 NULL이므로 IFNULL 처리) IFNULL((SELECT MAX(CDATE) FROM CHAT_MSG WHERE ROOM_NO = R.ROOM_NO), R.CRDATE) DESC
SELECT ROOM_NO AS roomNo, INO AS ino, BUYER_MNO AS buyerMno, SELLER_MNO AS sellerMno FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE INO = #{ino} AND BUYER_MNO = #{buyerMno} AND SELLER_MNO = #{sellerMno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM (ROOM_NO, INO, BUYER_MNO, SELLER_MNO, CRDATE) VALUES (#{roomNo}, #{ino}, #{buyerMno}, #{sellerMno}, NOW())
INSERT INTO CHAT_MSG (CNO, ROOM_NO, SENDER_MNO, CONTENT, CDATE, READYN) VALUES (#{cno}, #{roomNo}, #{senderMno}, #{content}, NOW(), 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT M.CNO AS cno, M.ROOM_NO AS roomNo, M.SENDER_MNO AS senderMno, MB.MID AS senderMid, M.CONTENT AS content, M.CDATE AS cdate, M.READYN AS readyn FROM CHAT_MSG M JOIN MEMBER MB ON M.SENDER_MNO = MB.MNO WHERE M.ROOM_NO = #{roomNo} ORDER BY M.CDATE ASC
SELECT MID FROM MEMBER WHERE MNO = #{mno}
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_MSG SET READYN = 'Y' WHERE ROOM_NO = #{roomNo} AND READYN = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_MSG WHERE ROOM_NO = #{roomNo} AND READYN = 'N'
